case_title: GRACIELA ESPINOZA VS. GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES-BOTEO

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-12-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-23-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$20.00); [FILER VERIFIES THAT SERVICE DATE IS 02/01/22] SERVED FEB-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER, AND STATUS ON STAY OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY.
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE DONE ON 2/9/22 (SERVICE FEE $75) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GRACIELA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURTS' OWN MOTION TO ALLOW FOR STATUS OF DEFENDANTS BANKRUPTCY AND TO ALLOW FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GRACIELA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO DEFENDANT FILED FOR BANKRUPTCY ON SEPTEMBER 28, 2020. PLAINTIFF IS LISTED AS A CREDITOR OF DEFENDANT. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S SON, JULIO MARTINEZ ASSISTED WITH SPANISH INTERPRETATION FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES-BOTEO IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO JUL-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES BOTEO IS NOT PRESENT. CASE ON CALENDAR FOR STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY STAY. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESPINOZA, GRACIELA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS OF DEFENDANT AND TO ALLOW FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF TO JUL-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GRACIELA ESPINOZA IS PRESENT. JULIO MARTINEZ ESPINOZA, SON, ACTS AS SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF. INTERPERTER'S OATH IS GIVEN. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO ADOLFO TORRES-BOTEO IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION: FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GRACIELA AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED BY DEFENDANT TORRES-BOTEO, GUSTAVO ADOLFO
